summary: 3D scene: ValueTracker s_tr interpolates A(s) = (1-s)I + sM with 2 targets — M_good (det=3, proper volume) and M_degen (det=0, flat). always_redraw RED/GREEN/BLUE column-vector arrows + YELLOW parallelepiped faces; ambient camera rotation. Fixed-frame panel shows |det A| updating live via Transform between phases.
